instruction: In Terminal, use Whisper's tiny model to make an SRT subtitle file for "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_2.ogg" and save it to "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_subtitles_2_1.srt".
reference_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_2.ogg" --model tiny --language en --output_format srt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && mv "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_en_2.srt" "$HOME/Desktop/whisper_subtitles_2_1.srt" && rmdir "$tmpdir"

parameters.expected_command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && whisper "$HOME/Documents/whisper_audio_en_2.ogg" --model tiny --language en --output_format srt --output_dir "$tmpdir" >/dev/null && cat "$tmpdir/whisper_audio_en_2.srt"; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
